name: ask
description: Agent-to-human request inbox. A single-binary inbox designed for AI coding agents to file requests for actions only a human can take — set up an OAuth credential, sign into a service, click around a feature and provide feedback, copy a file to a path the agent can't reach. Items live as plain JSON files in .ask/ inside any project. No server, no database, no schema setup.

interface.shortDescription: Agent-to-human request inbox for project-local asks.
interface.longDescription: File and manage human-action requests as plain JSON under each project's .ask/ directory, with Codex skills and MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: File an ask for the human.
